papers.title: Cardiometabolic multimorbidity and care experiences in primary healthcare among Brazilian adults aged 50 and over (ELSI-Brazil)
papers.translated_title: 巴西50岁及以上成年人的心脏代谢多重共病与初级医疗保健体验（ELSI-巴西研究）
papers.author: Souza, F. H. A. d.
papers.summary: Background: Population aging and the rising burden of non-communicable diseases have increased the prevalence of cardiometabolic multimorbidity (CM-MM) among older adults. Patient-reported experience measures (PREMs) are recognized as essential components of healthcare quality assessment, yet evidence on primary care experiences among individuals with CM-MM remains scarce. Objective: To analyze primary care experiences according to the presence of cardiometabolic multimorbidity among Brazilians aged 50 years and older. Methods: Cross-sectional study using data from the second wave of the Brazilian Longitudinal Study of Aging (ELSI-Brazil, 2019-2021; n = 9,949). CM-MM was defined as the self-reported coexistence of two or more of the following conditions: hypertension, diabetes mellitus, dyslipidemia, acute myocardial infarction, and stroke. Primary care experiences were assessed using a validated 12-item instrument organized into four domains: first-contact access, longitudinality, communication, and care coordination. Associations were estimated using Poisson regression adjusted for sociodemographic, health conditions, and healthcare utilization variables, with stratified analysis by Family Health Strategy (FHS) coverage. Results: CM-MM prevalence was 25.5%, with a progressive increase by age and an inverse gradient by education. Individuals with CM-MM reported significantly more positive experiences in longitudinality (mean index 2.53 vs. 2.34; adjusted PR = 1.22; 95%CI 1.12-1.33; p < 0.001) and, to a lesser extent, in communication (mean index 2.68 vs. 2.58; adjusted PR = 1.10; 95%CI 1.00-1.20; p = 0.041). No statistically significant differences were found in first-contact access or care coordination. After stratified by FHS coverage, the observed differences in longitudinality and communication were no longer statistically significant. Conclusions: CM-MM was associated with more positive primary care experiences in longitudinality and communication. The absence of differentiated experiences in first-contact access and coordination highlights structural gaps in primary care responsiveness to individuals with greater clinical complexity. Keywords: Multimorbidity; Cardiometabolic diseases; Primary Care; Patient-reported experience measures; Older adults; ELSI-Brazil.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：人口老龄化与非传染性疾病负担的加重，导致老年人心血管代谢多重疾病（CM-MM）患病率上升。患者报告体验指标（PREMs）被公认为医疗质量评估的核心要素，但关于CM-MM患者初级保健体验的证据仍较为匮乏。目的：分析50岁及以上巴西人群中，心血管代谢多重疾病与初级保健体验的关联。方法：基于巴西老龄化纵向研究（ELSI-Brazil）第二波数据（2019-2021年；n=9,949）开展横断面研究。CM-MM定义为自报同时患有以下两种及以上疾病：高血压、糖尿病、血脂异常、急性心肌梗死和脑卒中。采用经验证的12条目工具评估初级保健体验，该工具涵盖四个维度：首诊可及性、连续性、沟通及协调性。通过泊松回归分析关联性，调整社会人口学、健康状况及医疗服务利用变量，并按家庭健康策略（FHS）覆盖率进行分层分析。结果：CM-MM患病率为25.5%，随年龄增长呈递增趋势，与教育水平呈反向梯度。CM-MM患者在连续性维度报告了显著更积极的体验（平均指数2.53 vs. 2.34；调整后PR=1.22；95%CI 1.12-1.33；p<0.001），在沟通维度也呈现类似趋势（平均指数2.68 vs. 2.58；调整后PR=1.10；95%CI 1.00-1.20；p=0.041）。首诊可及性与协调性维度未见显著差异。按FHS覆盖率分层后，连续性与沟通维度的差异不再具有统计学意义。结论：CM-MM与连续性及沟通维度的更积极初级保健体验相关。首诊可及性与协调性维度缺乏差异化体验，揭示了初级保健对临床复杂性较高患者的响应性存在结构性缺陷。关键词：多重疾病；心血管代谢疾病；初级保健；患者报告体验指标；老年人；ELSI-Brazil。

papers.title: The Impact of Pregnant Womens Dietary Behavior on the Physiological Adaptation Paradox and Maternal-Fetal Resource Conflict in Conflict Settings: A Predictive Analytical Study
papers.translated_title: 冲突环境下孕妇饮食行为对生理适应悖论及母胎资源冲突的影响：一项预测性分析研究
papers.author: Al-Wesabi, M. M.
papers.summary: This scientific study aims to assess the level of awareness, nutritional knowledge, and actual behavioral practices among pregnant women in the Capital District of Sanaa, Republic of Yemen, and to determine their impact on the health and clinical indicators of the mother and fetus under complex conflict conditions. The study employed a descriptive-analytical approach based on a simple random sample of 200 pregnant women attending government-run hospitals and specialized medical centers in the Capital District. Field data were collected during December 2025 using a structured and validated questionnaire consisting of 42 items measuring demographic variables, awareness, practices, barriers, and health outcomes. The results of the statistical analysis using SPSS software showed a high level of nutritional awareness (87%) and healthy dietary practices (80%) among the sample participants. Simple and multiple linear regression tests revealed a statistically significant effect of awareness and practices in explaining 20.2% of the variance in the health status of the mother and fetus (R{superscript 2}= 0.204, p < 0.001). The study demonstrated that actual behavioral practices have greater predictive power ({beta}=0.316, p=0.001) compared to theoretical cognitive awareness ({beta}=0.232, p=0.005) in determining clinical outcomes for the mother and fetus, highlighting the widening gap between knowledge and behavior under structural pressures. "Morning sickness" (80%) and the deterioration of "family economic status" (71%) emerged as the greatest physiological and material barriers to proper nutrition. With their inferential impact established as an extension of the maternal-fetal resource allocation conflict in a physiologically and economically challenging environment, the study also identified significant differences in nutritional behavior and health outcomes in favor of housewives and mothers who are more educated and have higher incomes, while no significant differences were recorded attributable to obstetric variables such as stage or order of pregnancy. The study offers a unique theoretical and practical contribution by formulating an integrated causal model that demonstrates that the fetus acts as a biological drain on the mothers cellular and mineral reserves in a war environment, which necessitates directing antenatal care and support programs toward effective behavioral empowerment and nutritional support to overcome the structural and material barriers faced by pregnant women.
papers.translated_summary: 本研究旨在评估也门共和国首都萨那地区孕妇的营养认知水平、知识掌握程度及实际行为实践，并确定其在复杂冲突条件下对母婴健康及临床指标的影响。研究采用描述性分析方法，以首都区公立医院和专科医疗中心的200名孕妇为简单随机样本。2025年12月通过结构化验证问卷收集现场数据，问卷包含42个条目，涵盖人口学变量、认知水平、行为实践、障碍因素及健康结局。SPSS软件统计分析显示，样本参与者营养认知水平较高（87%），健康饮食实践率达80%。简单与多元线性回归检验表明，认知与实践对母婴健康状态变异解释率达20.2%（R²=0.204，p<0.001），具有统计学显著效应。研究证实，实际行为实践（β=0.316，p=0.001）相比理论认知（β=0.232，p=0.005）对母婴临床结局具有更强预测力，凸显结构性压力下知识与行为间的鸿沟。妊娠剧吐（80%）与家庭经济状况恶化（71%）成为阻碍合理营养的最大生理与物质障碍。在生理与经济双重压力环境下，研究通过推断性影响验证了母婴资源分配冲突的延伸效应，同时发现家庭主妇、高学历及高收入母亲的营养行为与健康结局显著更优，而妊娠阶段或胎次等产科变量未呈现显著差异。本研究通过构建整合因果模型，揭示战争环境中胎儿对母体细胞与矿物质储备的生物性消耗机制，为产前护理与支持项目提供独特理论与实践贡献，强调需通过有效行为赋能与营养支持，帮助孕妇克服结构性及物质性障碍。

papers.title: Fine-Tuning SAM2 for Coronary Artery Segmentation in X-Ray Fluoroscopy
papers.translated_title: 微调SAM2用于X射线透视中的冠状动脉分割
papers.author: Sivakumar, E.
papers.summary: SAM2 (Meta, 2024) provides a strong starting point for segmentation, but given the unique challenges in medical imaging (noise from patient movement, the projection-based nature of X-ray fluoroscopy, and low contrast between vessels and background), direct application is difficult. We fine-tune MedSAM2 on annotated coronary angiograms and apply it to video data for point-of-care use. On the ARCADE validation set (200 images), the fine-tuned model achieves Dice 0.767 compared to 0.033 zero-shot. On 10 fluoroscopic video studies from CoronaryDominance, it tracks vessels coherently and avoids falsely segmenting ribs, stents, and bypass grafts in 9 of 10 studies. Code is available at https://github.com/elakiyasivakumar/SAM2-Coronary-Angiography-VA and the fine-tuned checkpoint at https://huggingface.co/Elakiya17/CA-SAM2.
papers.translated_summary: SAM2（Meta，2024）为分割任务提供了强大的起点，但鉴于医学影像中的独特挑战（患者运动产生的噪声、X射线透视的投影特性，以及血管与背景之间的低对比度），直接应用较为困难。我们在标注的冠状动脉造影图像上对MedSAM2进行微调，并将其应用于视频数据以实现即时检测。在ARCADE验证集（200张图像）上，微调模型达到Dice系数0.767，而零样本方法仅为0.033。在来自CoronaryDominance的10项透视视频研究中，该模型能连贯追踪血管，并在10项研究中的9项中成功避免对肋骨、支架和搭桥移植物的错误分割。代码见https://github.com/elakiyasivakumar/SAM2-Coronary-Angiography-VA，微调模型检查点见https://huggingface.co/Elakiya17/CA-SAM2。

papers.title: Hyperleukocytosis and outcomes in pediatric B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia: A report from the REDIAL Consortium
papers.translated_title: 儿童B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病中的高白细胞血症与预后：REDIAL联盟报告
papers.author: Kim, J. J.
papers.summary: Hyperleukocytosis (white blood cell [WBC] count >100 000/uL) at diagnosis is an important prognostic risk factor in pediatric acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL), though its significance with contemporary therapy is unclear. We analyzed 1 826 pediatric ALL patients from a multi-institution cohort to determine whether hyperleukocytosis independently predicts outcomes using multivariable Cox proportional hazard modeling. Hyperleukocytosis occurred in 211 patients (12%), with 121 having B-ALL, and showed no prognostic significance in T-ALL patients. In B-ALL, 5-year event-free survival (EFS) was 65% versus 89% for non-hyperleukocytosis patients, and overall survival (OS) was 78% versus 93%. After adjustment for age, cytogenetic risk, central nervous system disease status, and treatment site, hyperleukocytosis remained an independent predictor of end-of-induction minimal residual disease (MRD) positivity (odds ratio 2.53 [95% confidence interval [CI]: 1.71-3.94; p<0.001]), inferior EFS (hazard ratio [HR] 2.44; 95% CI: 1.77-3.38; p<0.001) and inferior OS (HR 2.00; 95% CI: 1.29-3.12; p=0.002). A continuous dose-response relationship was observed between WBC count and these outcomes. Survival associations persisted across all cytogenetic risk categories and MRD strata. Despite risk-adapted therapy with treatment intensification for high-risk features, hyperleukocytosis identifies an aggressive B-ALL phenotype with persistently inferior outcomes, suggesting these patients may benefit from novel therapeutic approaches.
papers.translated_summary: 初诊时高白细胞血症（白细胞计数>100 000/uL）是儿童急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）的重要预后危险因素，但其在当代治疗方案中的意义尚不明确。我们分析了来自多中心队列的1 826例儿童ALL患者，通过多变量Cox比例风险模型评估高白细胞血症是否独立预测预后。211例患者（12%）出现高白细胞血症，其中121例为B-ALL，而该指标在T-ALL患者中无预后意义。在B-ALL中，高白细胞血症患者5年无事件生存率（EFS）为65%，非高白细胞血症患者为89%；总生存率（OS）分别为78%和93%。经年龄、细胞遗传学风险、中枢神经系统疾病状态及治疗中心校正后，高白细胞血症仍是诱导结束时微小残留病（MRD）阳性的独立预测因子（比值比2.53 [95%置信区间[CI]：1.71-3.94；p<0.001]）、较差EFS（风险比[HR] 2.44；95% CI：1.77-3.38；p<0.001）和较差OS（HR 2.00；95% CI：1.29-3.12；p=0.002）的独立预测因子。白细胞计数与这些结局之间存在连续剂量-反应关系。所有细胞遗传学风险类别和MRD分层中均持续存在生存关联。尽管针对高危特征采用风险适应性治疗并强化治疗，高白细胞血症仍提示侵袭性B-ALL表型且预后持续较差，提示此类患者可能受益于新型治疗策略。

papers.title: Reassessing Instrument Strength in Two-Sample Mendelian Randomization Analysis
papers.translated_title: 重新评估两样本孟德尔随机化分析中的工具变量强度
papers.author: Liu, X.
papers.summary: Mendelian randomization (MR) analysis is widely used to estimate causal relationships between risk factors and outcomes of interest. Two-sample MR approaches have gained increasing attention in genetic epidemiology due to the growing availability of Genome-Wide Association Study (GWAS) summary statistics from public databases. A critical step in two-sample MR is the selection of genetic variants as instrumental variables (IVs). Although genome-wide significant variants are typically preferred, the inclusion of variants with weaker association p-values is considered, as they may potentially improve power through an increased instrument number of instruments, while they may introduce weak instrument bias and attenuate effect estimates towards the null. Our simulation results show that even modest levels of pleiotropy substantially increase the variability of causal effect estimates, while the inclusion of weak IVs does not substantially affect the direction and variability of causal effect estimates in most cases. In real data analyses, we used two released versions of FinnGen GWAS summary statistics with different sample sizes as exposure GWASs to assess the influence of weak IVs. Here, the inclusion of IVs with higher exposure-association p-values resulted in weakened estimated effect sizes, particularly when the exposure GWAS sample size was small. These findings suggest that incorporating weak IVs is reasonable when the exposure GWAS sample size is large, but it poses a risk of falsely concluding null associations when the exposure GWAS sample size is small.
papers.translated_summary: 孟德尔随机化（MR）分析广泛应用于评估风险因素与目标结局之间的因果关系。随着公共数据库中全基因组关联研究（GWAS）汇总统计数据的日益丰富，双样本MR方法在遗传流行病学中受到越来越多的关注。双样本MR的关键步骤是选择遗传变异作为工具变量（IVs）。尽管通常优先选择全基因组显著变异，但也会考虑纳入关联p值较弱的变异，因为增加工具变量数量可能提升统计效力，但同时也可能引入弱工具变量偏倚，使效应估计值向零值衰减。我们的模拟结果显示，即使存在中等程度的多效性，也会显著增加因果效应估计的变异性，而在多数情况下，纳入弱IVs对因果效应估计的方向和变异性影响不大。在真实数据分析中，我们使用两个不同样本量的FinnGen GWAS汇总统计数据版本作为暴露GWAS，评估弱IVs的影响。结果显示，当纳入暴露关联p值较高的IVs时，效应估计值会减弱，尤其在暴露GWAS样本量较小时更为明显。这些发现表明，当暴露GWAS样本量较大时，纳入弱IVs是合理的；但当暴露GWAS样本量较小时，这种做法可能导致错误地得出零关联结论的风险。

papers.title: Grey- and white-matter resilience to tau, cognition and sex in Alzheimer's disease
papers.translated_title: 阿尔茨海默病中灰质和白质对tau蛋白、认知及性别的弹性
papers.author: Boutin, S.
papers.summary: INTRODUCTION: Brain resilience to tau has been mainly studied in relation to grey matter, while its role in white matter remains unclear in Alzheimer's disease (AD). Sex may moderate associations between brain resilience and cognition. METHODS: We analyzed medial temporal lobe tau PET SUVR, entorhinal cortical thickness, cingulum-hippocampal mean diffusivity, and cognition in 205 amyloid-positive individuals from ADNI. Associations between grey- and white-matter resilience to tau and cognitive performance or decline were examined using linear and mixed-effects models, including sex interactions and stratified analyses. RESULTS: Higher grey-matter resilience to tau related to better cross-sectional memory and language performance (p<0.005), whereas higher white-matter resilience related to slower decline in these domains (p<0.03). These associations were seen in men but not women. DISCUSSION: White-matter resilience may better capture early cognitive changes in AD. Sex differences suggest greater sensitivity of cognition to brain resilience in men.
papers.translated_summary: 引言：大脑对tau蛋白的韧性研究主要集中于灰质，但其在阿尔茨海默病（AD）白质中的作用尚不明确。性别可能调节大脑韧性与认知功能之间的关联。方法：我们分析了ADNI中205名淀粉样蛋白阳性个体的内侧颞叶tau PET SUVR、内嗅皮层厚度、扣带回-海马平均弥散率及认知功能。通过线性模型和混合效应模型（含性别交互作用及分层分析）检验灰质和白质对tau蛋白的韧性与认知表现或衰退的关联。结果：灰质对tau蛋白的韧性越高，与更好的横断面记忆和语言表现相关（p<0.005）；而白质韧性越高，与这些认知领域更缓慢的衰退相关（p<0.03）。这些关联仅在男性中观察到，女性中未发现。讨论：白质韧性可能更敏感地反映AD早期认知变化。性别差异表明男性认知功能对大脑韧性的敏感性更高。

papers.title: "Us with them": Co-designing a caesarean section consent and debriefing intervention in West Cameroon
papers.translated_title: “我们与他们”：在西喀麦隆共同设计剖宫产知情同意与术后反馈干预方案
papers.author: Fouogue, J. T.
papers.summary: Background Women-centred maternity care is a rights issue that determines the use of services. Such care ensures responsiveness to womens needs which is enacted through shared decision-making, review and response. In the West Region of Cameroon, informed consent (IC) and Debriefing for caesarean section (c-section) have been shown to be suboptimal or absent. This paper describes the participatory design of a quality-improvement hospital-based intervention. Methods From February to May 2025, we conducted a co-design process with three groups of stakeholders: 59 post c-section women and community representatives, 78 frontline c-section providers, and 29 directors of public and private hospitals. We followed four phases: planning, conducting, evaluating, and reporting. The conduct phase comprised five all-day workshops with post c-section women and community representatives, followed by five all-day workshops with the c-section providers. Finally, we held an 11th workshop with the hospital directors to scrutinize suggested interventions, evaluate their feasibility, and establish a consensus on their components. We described the intervention using the TIDieR (Template for Intervention Description and Replication) checklist. We documented the co-design process, using open-ended narratives to delineate interventions, and carried out real-time synthesis on visual aids (whiteboards and flipcharts). Intervention feasibility was quantified using a structured ad hoc matrix, while insights on facilitators and barriers were captured through qualitative free-text entries. We coupled data collection with constant comparison and triangulation through contemporaneous field notes, photographic documentation, and thematic mapping of stakeholders perceptions and interactive dynamics. Results Participants perspectives on the co-design were positive, and their motivation were very high although less than 50% reported previous involvement in co-design processes. More than 80% of participants found rated the co-design process as either good or very good. The final intervention comprised four components: (i) an in-service training; (ii) a standard operating procedure including a harmonised consent form and debriefing checklist; (ii) systematic supportive supervision, monitoring & evaluation; and (iv) a routine clinical audit. Each group of stakeholders upheld specific dimensions of the consent and debrief intervention. Post c-section women and community members emphasized emotional support, written discharge advice after debriefing, and zero tolerance of suboptimal consent and debriefing practices. Frontline c-section providers insisted on robust documentation for medico-legal protection. Hospitals Directors emphasized capacity-building and cultural friendliness. All the groups supported womans autonomous decision making. The intervention feasibility was rated high or very high by hospital directors except for the financial, infrastructural and technical domains. Conclusion This co-design process yielded a context-specific, multi-component intervention that was well accepted and deemed feasible across stakeholders. It provides a methodological approach to strengthening informed consent and debriefing as core elements of women-centred, accountable maternity care, and warrants implementation.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 以妇女为中心的产科护理是一项决定服务利用的权利问题。这种护理确保响应妇女的需求，通过共同决策、审查和反馈来实现。在喀麦隆西部地区，剖宫产的知情同意和术后反馈被证明不理想或缺失。本文描述了一项基于医院的参与式质量改进干预措施的设计。 方法 2025年2月至5月，我们与三组利益相关者进行了共同设计过程：59名剖宫产后妇女和社区代表、78名一线剖宫产提供者以及29名公立和私立医院院长。我们遵循四个阶段：规划、实施、评估和报告。实施阶段包括与剖宫产后妇女和社区代表举行的五次全天研讨会，随后与剖宫产提供者举行五次全天研讨会。最后，我们与医院院长举行了第11次研讨会，审查建议的干预措施，评估其可行性，并就其组成部分达成共识。我们使用TIDieR清单描述干预措施。我们记录了共同设计过程，使用开放式叙述来界定干预措施，并在视觉辅助工具上进行实时综合。干预可行性通过结构化临时矩阵进行量化，而促进因素和障碍的见解通过定性自由文本条目收集。我们通过同期现场笔记、照片记录以及利益相关者感知和互动动态的主题映射，将数据收集与持续比较和三角验证相结合。 结果 参与者对共同设计的看法积极，尽管不到50%的人报告曾参与过共同设计过程，但他们的动机非常高。超过80%的参与者将共同设计过程评为良好或非常好。最终干预措施包括四个组成部分：（i）在职培训；（ii）标准操作程序，包括统一的同意书和反馈检查表；（iii）系统性的支持性监督、监测与评估；（iv）常规临床审计。每组利益相关者坚持同意和反馈干预的具体方面。剖宫产后妇女和社区成员强调情感支持、反馈后的书面出院建议，以及对不理想的同意和反馈实践的零容忍。一线剖宫产提供者坚持为医疗法律保护提供强有力的文件记录。医院院长强调能力建设和文化友好性。所有群体支持妇女的自主决策。除财务、基础设施和技术领域外，医院院长将干预可行性评为高或非常高。 结论 这一共同设计过程产生了一项针对具体情境、多组成部分的干预措施，受到利益相关者的广泛接受并被认为可行。它提供了一种方法论，以加强知情同意和反馈作为以妇女为中心、负责任的产科护理的核心要素，并值得实施。

papers.title: Within-host pathogen population diversity predicts treatment response in tuberculosis
papers.translated_title: 宿主内病原体种群多样性可预测结核病治疗反应。
papers.author: Kulkarni, S.
papers.summary: Background: Tuberculosis (TB) treatment outcomes remain suboptimal, and standard clinical diagnostics cannot reliably identify patients at high risk of treatment failure or relapse at the time of diagnosis. While within-host Mycobacterium tuberculosis genetic diversity is hypothesized to reflect the viable bacterial burden and adaptive capacity of the infection, its clinical prognostic value remains unknown. Methods: We conducted a prospective cohort study of 364 patients with newly diagnosed, rifampicin-susceptible pulmonary TB in South Africa. Patients received standard 6-month therapy and were monitored for up to two years to ascertain composite unfavorable outcomes (treatment failure, death, or relapse). To accurately detect low-frequency (unfixed) genetic variants and eliminate reference bias artifacts, we mapped medium to high depth short-read sequences against matched, patient-specific long-read assemblies. The association between baseline pathogen genetic diversity and clinical outcomes was evaluated using multivariable Cox proportional-hazards models. Results: After bioinformatic filtering, true unfixed variants were relatively rare but significantly enriched in genes mediating pathogen adaptation and drug tolerance, including transporter proteins and two-component regulatory systems. Within-host bacterial genetic diversity (i.e., the total number of unfixed variants) ranged from 0-20, with a median of 1 per patient. In survival analysis adjusting for known clinical risk factors--including HIV status, prior TB, baseline smear positivity, and radiographic lung involvement--baseline within-host genetic diversity emerged as a strong, independent predictor of unfavorable treatment outcomes. For patients with greater than 3 unfixed variants at diagnosis, each increase of 5 unfixed variants was associated with more than double the risk of a composite unfavorable outcome (adjusted Hazard Ratio, 2.36; 95% CI, 1.27 to 4.39; p=0.007). Conclusions: Baseline within-host pathogen genetic diversity is an independent predictor of unfavorable TB treatment outcomes. As sequencing becomes increasingly integrated into routine diagnostics, quantifying unfixed variants is an accessible approach that promises to risk-stratify patients and guide the duration of individualized regimens.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：结核病治疗结局仍不理想，标准临床诊断方法无法在确诊时可靠识别治疗失败或复发高风险患者。尽管宿主内结核分枝杆菌遗传多样性被认为可反映感染的可存活细菌负荷及适应能力，但其临床预后价值尚不明确。方法：我们在南非开展了一项前瞻性队列研究，纳入364例新诊断利福平敏感型肺结核患者。患者接受标准6个月治疗，并随访长达两年以确定复合不良结局（治疗失败、死亡或复发）。为准确检测低频（未固定）遗传变异并消除参考偏差伪影，我们将中高深度短读序列比对至匹配的患者特异性长读段组装序列。采用多变量Cox比例风险模型评估基线病原体遗传多样性与临床结局的关联。结果：经生物信息学过滤后，真实未固定变异相对罕见，但在介导病原体适应性和药物耐受性的基因（包括转运蛋白和双组分调控系统）中显著富集。宿主内细菌遗传多样性（即未固定变异总数）范围为0-20，中位数为每例患者1个。在调整已知临床风险因素（包括HIV状态、既往结核病史、基线痰涂片阳性及影像学肺部受累）的生存分析中，基线宿主内遗传多样性成为治疗不良结局的强独立预测因子。对于诊断时存在超过3个未固定变异的患者，每增加5个未固定变异，复合不良结局风险增加一倍以上（校正风险比2.36；95%置信区间1.27-4.39；p=0.007）。结论：基线宿主内病原体遗传多样性是结核病治疗不良结局的独立预测因子。随着测序技术日益整合至常规诊断，量化未固定变异是一种可及的方法，有望实现患者风险分层并指导个体化疗程。

papers.title: A soluble bi-specific fusion protein for the improved expansion of human CD8+ CAR-T cells
papers.translated_title: 一种用于改善人CD8+ CAR-T细胞扩增的可溶性双特异性融合蛋白
papers.author: Law, J. C.
papers.summary: The success of Chimeric Antigen Receptor (CAR) T cell therapy is heavily dependent on the quality of the final cellular product. Current expansion protocols often rely on reagents that require removal from cell culture media, posing logistical challenges in manufacturing, and can also lead to terminal differentiation. Here, we evaluate the use of a soluble, bead-free T cell activator, T cell expansion protein (T-CEP), as a streamlined alternative for generating potent CAR-T cells. Human T cells were activated with T-CEP or known T cell activators (Dynabeads and TransAct) and transduced with either CD19 or interleukin-13 (IL-13) mutein (tetravariant-13; TV-13)-based CAR lentiviral vectors. Our results demonstrate that T-CEP supports robust CAR-T cell expansion and achieves transduction efficiencies comparable to commercial reagents for both types of CAR-T cells. Notably, T-CEP significantly favored the expansion of CD8+ T cells, yielding an enhanced CD27+ phenotype and a lower CD4:CD8 ratio compared to TransAct. Cytotoxicity assays confirmed that T-CEP-expanded CAR-T cells possess cytolytic function equivalent to commercial reagents for both CARs, while exhibiting lower levels of inflammatory cytokine secretion. In summary, T-CEP represents a competitive alternative to existing expansion agents, as it does not require its removal during CAR-T manufacturing and generates a CD8+ dominant, less-differentiated phenotype without compromising efficacy.
papers.translated_summary: 嵌合抗原受体（CAR）T细胞疗法的成功高度依赖于最终细胞产品的质量。目前的扩增方案通常依赖需要从细胞培养基中去除的试剂，这给生产带来了物流挑战，并可能导致终末分化。本研究评估了可溶性无珠T细胞激活剂——T细胞扩增蛋白（T-CEP）作为生成高效CAR-T细胞的简化替代方案。使用T-CEP或已知T细胞激活剂（Dynabeads和TransAct）激活人T细胞，并用基于CD19或白细胞介素-13（IL-13）突变蛋白（四突变体-13；TV-13）的CAR慢病毒载体进行转导。结果表明，T-CEP支持稳健的CAR-T细胞扩增，且对两种CAR-T细胞均能达到与商业试剂相当的转导效率。值得注意的是，与TransAct相比，T-CEP显著促进CD8+ T细胞扩增，产生增强的CD27+表型和更低的CD4:CD8比值。细胞毒性实验证实，T-CEP扩增的CAR-T细胞对两种CAR均具有与商业试剂相当的细胞溶解功能，同时表现出较低水平的炎症细胞因子分泌。总之，T-CEP是现有扩增剂的有力替代品，在CAR-T生产过程中无需去除，并能生成以CD8+为主、分化程度较低的表型，且不损害疗效。

papers.title: Performance of family history-based colorectal cancer screening criteria by race and age at diagnosis in the Disparities and Cancer Epidemiology (DANCE) study
papers.translated_title: 在差异与癌症流行病学（DANCE）研究中，基于家族史的结直肠癌筛查标准按种族和诊断年龄的表现
papers.author: Purrington, K.
papers.summary: Importance: Family history (FH) and age are the primary criteria employed for early colorectal cancer (CRC) risk stratification. We evaluated how well these criteria identify individuals diagnosed with CRC across age and racial groups. Objective: To evaluate the performance of FH and age based screening criteria for identifying individuals with CRC, with attention to differences by race and age at diagnosis. Design, Setting, and Participants: This case control and case only analysis used data from the Disparities and Cancer Epidemiology (DANCE) cohort, a population based study of invasive CRC cases diagnosed from 2013 to 2022, recruited through the Metropolitan Detroit Cancer Surveillance System and the Louisiana Tumor Registry. Analyses included 1,158 non-Hispanic Black (NHB) and non-Hispanic White (NHW) CRC cases and 1,434 cancer-free controls from the Inflammation Health and Lung Epidemiology (INHALE) study, enrolled from the same Detroit catchment area. Data were analyzed in 2025. Exposures: Self reported cancer FH among first-degree (FD) relatives and grandparents, summarized into three FH-based screening criteria: at least one FD relative with CRC (colon early-screening criterion), any FH of Lynch syndrome related cancers, and meeting NCCN criteria for Lynch syndrome genetic testing. Main Outcomes and Measures: Proportion of cases meeting each FH based screening criterion stratified by race and age at diagnosis (<45, 45 - 49, 50 - 64, and <65 years); case only odds ratios for younger age at diagnosis; and case control odds ratios for CRC associated with each criterion, with race-by-age interaction tested. Results: Cancer FH burden differed by age at diagnosis across both racial groups. First degree (FD) CRC FH was highest among NHB CRC cases diagnosed before age 45 (22.6%) and lowest in those diagnosed at ages 45-49 (8.2%), while NHW participants reported more CRC FH with older age at diagnosis (p interaction=0.011). In case control analyses, having at least one FD relative with CRC was associated with higher odds of CRC before age 45 among NHB (OR=1.44, 95% CI 1.09 - 1.89) but not NHW individuals. The proportion of cases diagnosed before age 45 with a FD CRC FH was low, though markedly higher in NHB than NHW individuals (22.6% vs. 4.0%). While the proportion was slightly higher when including FH of any Lynch syndrome-related cancers (NHB: 24.5%, NHW: 10.0%), the proportion of controls with a FD FH of these cancers also increased. Conclusions and Relevance: Current family history-based criteria fail to identify the majority of individuals diagnosed with CRC before age 45, with performance varying substantially by race, highlighting the urgent need for more equitable and effective approaches to early-onset CRC risk stratification.
papers.translated_summary: 重要性：家族史（FH）和年龄是用于结直肠癌（CRC）早期风险分层的主要标准。我们评估了这些标准在不同年龄和种族群体中识别CRC确诊患者的效果。目的：评估基于FH和年龄的筛查标准在识别CRC患者中的表现，重点关注种族和确诊年龄差异。设计、设置与参与者：本病例对照及仅病例分析使用了来自差异与癌症流行病学（DANCE）队列的数据，该队列是基于人群的研究，纳入2013至2022年间确诊的浸润性CRC病例，通过大都会底特律癌症监测系统和路易斯安那州肿瘤登记处招募。分析包括1,158例非西班牙裔黑人（NHB）和非西班牙裔白人（NHW）CRC病例，以及来自炎症健康与肺流行病学（INHALE）研究的1,434名无癌对照者，均来自同一底特律区域。数据分析于2025年进行。暴露因素：自我报告的一级亲属（FD）和祖父母癌症FH，归纳为三种基于FH的筛查标准：至少一名FD亲属患CRC（结肠早期筛查标准）、任何林奇综合征相关癌症FH、以及符合NCCN林奇综合征基因检测标准。主要结局与测量指标：按种族和确诊年龄（<45、45-49、50-64和<65岁）分层，符合各FH筛查标准的病例比例；仅病例分析中年轻确诊年龄的比值比；以及病例对照分析中各标准与CRC相关的比值比，并检验种族与年龄的交互作用。结果：癌症FH负担因确诊年龄而异，且在两种族群中均有差异。一级亲属CRC FH在45岁前确诊的NHB病例中最高（22.6%），在45-49岁确诊者中最低（8.2%），而NHW参与者中CRC FH随确诊年龄增加而升高（交互作用p=0.011）。在病例对照分析中，至少一名FD亲属患CRC与NHB个体45岁前CRC风险升高相关（OR=1.44，95% CI 1.09-1.89），但NHW个体中无此关联。45岁前确诊的病例中，具有FD CRC FH的比例较低，但NHB个体显著高于NHW个体（22.6% vs. 4.0%）。当纳入任何林奇综合征相关癌症FH时，比例略有升高（NHB：24.5%，NHW：10.0%），但对照者中具有这些癌症FD FH的比例也相应增加。结论与相关性：当前基于家族史的筛查标准未能识别大多数45岁前确诊的CRC患者，且其表现因种族差异显著，凸显了亟需更公平有效的早发性CRC风险分层方法。
